messages.body: Where were you just before the alarm went up?
Outside the board room, hanging programs. It was maybe 22:19 or 22:20. Jonas Hart came out of the archive corridor with Mara's paper folder in one hand and a gray reel tin tucked under it.
Did he say anything to you?
He told me Mara had changed her mind about the presentation and said I should fetch the board chair after he checked on something downstairs.
Did you see the reel again after that?
No. Security was shouting about Studio B a few minutes later, and the tin was gone.
